1. 開Registry Editor
1.1. 撳Window掣

1.3. 開Registry Editor

2.搵SystemBiosVersion
2.1. 去呢個Directory:
     Computer\HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\HARDWARE\DESCRIPTION\System
2.2. Double click "SystemBiosVersion"

3. 改SystemBiosVersion嘅Value
a. 可以選擇刪晒佢
b. 可以刪淨"Parallels EFI x64 xx.0.0-xxxxx - xxXXxx"嗰行
